manifest_source: Local manifest compare by default. Provide a trusted release-metadata.json from a newer top-skill snapshot when comparison is needed.
notes: top-skill is the foundational stable TOP skill package. Update checking is supported but depends on an explicitly provided comparison manifest.
hydration_policy: On every invocation the agent reads hydration-manifest.json from the skill base directory and hydrates from the filesystem before applying any skill content. Packaged SKILL.md is bootstrap and fallback only.
